title: PsiMeter shared definitions
description: Reusable $defs shared by the PsiMeter JSON Schemas. The normative formats live in spec/psimeter-protocol.md; packages/core/src/types.ts is the implementing source. $id values are relative filenames, resolvable from the schema/ directory.

hashString.description: A hash string (spec §5.1): the algorithm, a colon, and the lowercase-hex digest. PsiMeter uses SHA-256 (64 hex digits). GENESIS_PREV is sha256: followed by 64 zeros.

hex.description: Lowercase hexadecimal string (no prefix), e.g. a beacon round value or signature.

ed25519Key.description: An Ed25519 public key (spec §5.3): the literal prefix ed25519: followed by lowercase hex.

ed25519Sig.description: An Ed25519 signature (spec §5.3): the literal prefix ed25519: followed by lowercase hex.

anchor.description: The human anchor (spec §7.2): the first 60 bits of the precommit digest as twelve Crockford base-32 symbols (alphabet excludes I, L, O, U), in three hyphen-separated groups of four.

committableValue.description: A value admissible in a content-hashed experiment definition's params/stimuli (spec §4, [PSI-EXP-2]): strings and safe integers only, nested in arrays/objects. Booleans, nulls and floats are rejected so the canonical byte form is portable across languages.

beaconRef.description: A public-beacon pulse reference (spec §8.1, BeaconRef). source/round/value are required; chainHash/signature are optional.

entropyKind.description: Physical/logical class of an entropy source (spec D1, types.ts EntropyKind).

entropySource.description: The recorded entropy source (spec §9.4, §10; types.ts EntropySource projection {id, kind, confirmatory, metadata}).

entropyMetadata.description: Entropy source metadata (types.ts EntropyMetadata). sampling holds the exact, frozen sampling parameters and is required.

witnessAttestation.description: One witness co-signature (spec §13.1, [PSI-WITNESS-2]; types.ts WitnessAttestation). witnessRound is bound inside the signed statement.

witnessBlock.description: The seal's session-level witness summary (server kinds/*.ts): the quorum threshold, the distinct co-signing keys, and the open/seal attestation sets.

witnessedCheckpoint.description: A micro-PK checkpoint persisted in the seal with its live witness co-signatures (spec §13.2, [PSI-WITNESS-3]; server kinds/microPk.ts WitnessedCheckpoint).
